description: Style NoteKeep your cool this summer in this white printed knee length kurta from diva. Pair it with an elm green knit churidar and strappy sandals for that day out at the bazaar.Product DetailsWhite kurta with elm green yoke with pin tucks in white and sequin embellishment, round neckline, side vents, printed border at sleeve and bottom hemMaterial and CareBlended fabricDry clean onlySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing size S
